title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
